description: Design loads, codes, specifications and standards; philosophies of design; load and resistance factor design (LRFD); allowable stress design (ASD); properties and types of structural steel; residual stresses; behavior and LRFD design criteria for tension members, compression; laterally braced and unbraced beams; essentials of bolted and welded connections.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: CIV ENGR 340, graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
